mnemonics.title: Top Cloud Security Risks
mnemonics.content: **D**ata **B**reaches, **A**ccount **H**ijacking, **I**nsecure **A**PIs, **M**alicious **I**nsiders, **S**hared **T**ech **V**ulnerabilities = **DB-AH-IA-MI-STV** (Database Ahead, I Am Missing Security Totally Verified).

mnemonics.title: PIA Steps
mnemonics.content: **I**dentify → **D**escribe → **I**dentify risks → **A**ssess → **D**ocument → **I**ntegrate = **I-D-I-A-D-I** (I Did It And Documented It).
